attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_ID, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.REQUEST_ID, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LEDGER_ID, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTING_DATE, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SUMMARY_BATCH_ID, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CATEGORY, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_NAME, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ENTERED_DR, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ENTERED_CR, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CURRENCY_CODE, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_DR, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_CR, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_CURRENCY_CODE, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_NUMBER, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_TYPE, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.TARGET_INSTANCE_ID, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT1, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT2, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT3, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT4, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT5, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT6, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT7, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT8, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT9, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT10, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT11, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT12, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT13, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT14, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT15, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CREATION_DATE, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CREATED_BY, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY
WHERE   SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BV_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
